title: Vung Tau、Ba Ria-Vung Tau — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Vung Tau、Ba Ria-Vung Tauの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Vung TauはBa Ria-Vung Tauにある人口450,000の都市です。A coastal city near Ho Chi Minh City known for its beaches, oil industry, and as a weekend getaway destination, offering a more relaxed pace than the big city.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
